name: Compagnie de Chemins de Fer Departementaux Societe Anonyme
summary: Compagnie de Chemins de Fer D√É¬©partementaux Soci√É¬©t√É¬© Anonyme, through its subsidiaries, engages in the industrial and railway businesses in France. The company offers railway equipment, including auto rails, rail cars, and funicular and cable-towed vehicles for passenger transport, as well as designs software for the logistics and transport activities. It also provides traction equipment, such as two- or three-axle locomotives, locomotive maneuvers, line locomotives, and rail road systems; and engages in the road transport of passengers and goods, as well as ski lifts. The company was founded in 1881 and is based in Suresnes, France.
